hooks.command: case "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}" in *.env|*.env.*|*credentials*|*secret*) echo '[HOOK] Blocked: sensitive file'; exit 1 ;; esac
case "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}" in *.env|*.env.*|*credentials*|*secret*) echo '[HOOK] Blocked: sensitive file'; exit 1 ;; esac

case "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}" in *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && python -m ruff check --fix --quiet "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || true; python -m ruff format --quiet "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || true ;; esac

case "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}" in F:/Python/Testcase-agent/src/*|F:/Python/Testcase-agent/optimization/*) TEST_FILE="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/tests/test_$(basename "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" .py).py"; if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && python -m pytest "$TEST_FILE" -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -15; fi ;; esac

case "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}" in *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && python -m ruff check --fix --quiet "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || true; python -m ruff format --quiet "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || true ;; esac

case "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}" in F:/Python/Testcase-agent/src/*|F:/Python/Testcase-agent/optimization/*) TEST_FILE="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/tests/test_$(basename "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" .py).py"; if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && python -m pytest "$TEST_FILE" -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -15; fi ;; esac
